title: 动漫插画创作图
description: A highly detailed anime illustration of a fierce female warrior with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and piercing {argument name="eye color" default="blue"} eyes, wearing a mix of silver pl
prompt_raw: A highly detailed anime illustration of a fierce female warrior with long flowing black hair and piercing blue eyes, wearing a mix of silver plate armor with gold trim and a blue and white tunic. She is captured in a dynamic combat stance, swinging a massive, segmented metallic whip-sword that curves dramatically into the extreme foreground. The weapon leaves a sweeping trail of kinetic energy and wind. The scene is set against a ruined battlefield with rocky terrain, floating debris, and large blue banners fluttering in the wind under a dramatic cloudy sky. The artwork features cinematic lighting, intense action, and a dramatic forced perspective on the weapon.
prompt_preview: A highly detailed anime illustration of a fierce female warrior with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and piercing {argument name="eye color" default="blue"} eyes, wearing a mix of silver pl
prompt_display_cn:
案例「hair color」属于动漫插画创作图。这是一条综合视觉案例，需要从原始提示词中提炼画面类型、主体、风格、构图、文字和用途，再转成中文展示版与可填空模板。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A highly detailed anime 插画 of a fierce female warrior with long flowing 【hair color：black】 hair and piercing 【eye color：blue】 eyes, wearing a mix of silver plate armor with gold trim and a 【outfit color：blue and white】 tunic. She is captured in a dynamic combat stance, swinging a massive, 【weapon type：segmented metallic whip-sword】 that curves dramatically into the extreme foreground. The weapon leaves a sweeping trail of kinetic energy and wind. The scene is set against a 【背景 setting：ruined battlefield with rocky terrain, floating debris, and large blue banners fluttering in the wind】 under a dramatic cloudy sky. The artwork features 电影感 光线ing, intense action, and a dramatic forced perspective on the weapon.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【主题】的视觉设计图。

画面主体：
主要表现【主体对象】，突出【核心特征】。

风格与氛围：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】。

构图与背景：
采用【构图方式】，背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【辅助元素】。

文字内容：
如需文字，显示【文字内容】，要求清晰可读，不要乱码。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【使用场景】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"主体对象","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主体对象","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"核心特征","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入核心特征","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"视觉风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入视觉风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"情绪氛围","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入情绪氛围","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"主色调","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色调","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"构图方式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入构图方式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"背景元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入背景元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"辅助元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入辅助元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"文字内容","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入文字内容","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"使用场景","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入使用场景","required":true,"type":"text"}]
